prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens in an indoor domestic or hotel-like space. A man partially emerges from behind a doorway or wall on the left side of the frame. The setting includes warm wall lamps, framed wall art, a side table, and plants, giving the space a softly lit interior atmosphere.

The scene then cuts to a large indoor sports facility or gymnasium. A single figure stands or walks in front of a brightly lit doorway at the far end of a polished floor. The strong backlight creates a silhouette and a reflection on the floor. Dark bleachers or seating are visible to the right.

Next, inside the gym, a man in athletic clothing is seen from behind or side-back view. He appears to be on a basketball court. Another person is visible farther away holding or near a basketball. The gym is dimly lit with overhead lights and a high ceiling.

The commercial then cuts to a close-up of hands holding a smartphone. A basketball is partly visible at the left edge of the frame, and the person wears a dark wristband or watch. The phone has a light-colored back with a prominent rear camera area.

A following medium shot shows the man in the gym holding the smartphone. He wears a dark athletic T-shirt with a small white logo on the chest. He looks toward the camera with a slight, knowing expression. The gym ceiling, lights, and wall details remain visible behind him.

The focus then shifts to product imagery. A close-up shows the phone’s rear camera module in dramatic low lighting, emphasizing the lenses and metallic-looking camera bar or housing.

Another dark product shot shows the phone from the side or partially open/angled profile against a black background. Only the illuminated edges and thin form of the device are clearly visible.

Near the end, the screen becomes almost entirely black with a small glowing square or light at the center. White text appears near the bottom reading: “Shop now at GoogleStore.com”.

The final frame shows the multicolored Google “G” logo centered on a black background. The same white bottom text remains: “Shop now at GoogleStore.com”.
